shortDescription: Show a player's wins, losses, and streak on stream.
longDescription: PlayerStreak keeps session and global win/loss history for Rocket League players and renders a compact overlay widget with either all modes grouped together or streaks separated automatically by the current Cast Package game mode. It reads Cast Package sequence and player-stats state for mode and player data, and offers package-level defaults plus distinct clean, broadcast, neon, ribbon, and terminal themes for player overlays.
